mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skills (resume_id, skill_name, proficiency_level, category, sort_order) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{skillName}, #{proficiencyLevel}, #{category}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM skills WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM skills WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
SELECT id FROM skills WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId}
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM skills WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' ORDER BY category ASC
